title: erigeron onofrensis
intro: Erigeron onofrensis, also known as Onofre's Fleabane, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family that is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Erigeron onofrensis include reducing inflammation and promoting tissue repair, making it a potential treatment for conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Erigeron onofrensis can be made into teas, infusions, and salves, and are often used topically to treat skin conditions and wounds.
